mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate discount rates and borrowing costs, directly increasing the present value of future equity cash flows and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly positive.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and falling consumer income, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 55% of triggered instances over a 5-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with stable inflation indicates robust consumer demand without pricing pressure, which supports corporate revenue growth and generates positive market returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance with p-value greater than 0.10 in out-of-sample regression tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during late-cycle expansions reflects peak capacity utilization and earnings momentum, generating short-term positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or becomes statistically insignificant during late-cycle expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts signal expanding residential investment and construction sector growth, which correlates with positive forward equity returns through multiplier effects.
failure_condition: Sixty-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with housing starts over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid monthly inflation increases trigger expectations of monetary tightening and margin compression, causing negative equity returns as discount rates rise.
failure_condition: Market returns remain positive in more than 60% of high-inflation trigger months during walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll employment growth and declining unemployment rates confirm broad-based labor market improvement, driving positive equity performance through higher consumer spending.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to outperform single-series signals in walk-forward testing with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding two percent annualized during post-recession expansions confirms economic recovery momentum, supporting positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: GDP growth signals lose predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 in post-recession quarters over rolling windows.
